title: Tile Editor Tool
subtitle: Unity Tool Programming | Custom Editor | Level Design
content: Unity Tool Programming - A customizable tile editor tool to create levels!
status: Development Complete and used in game
description: An in-editor Unity Tool created using Unity and C# to assist developers/designers alike to easily populate a variety of tiles to make a level.

highlights.name: Customisable Tile Palette
highlights.detail: Users can build a personalised palette by adding any tiles of their choice, keeping the workflow flexible.

highlights.name: 3D Grid System
highlights.detail: A 3D grid-based painting system enhances level visibility and makes tile placement faster and more precise.

highlights.name: Designer-Focused Workflow
highlights.detail: Built to help level designers rapidly prototype and iterate without needing to write code.

highlights.name: In-Game Integration
highlights.detail: Integrated directly into a Tower Defense prototype, proving the tool in a real production context.

roles: Designed and developed as a solo project
Designed the tool's workflow with level designers as the primary user
Developed the tile editor UI windows, palette logic, and 3D grid system
Integrated the tool into a Tower Defense game prototype
details: Designed and developed a 3D tile editor tool within Unity and C# to streamline the level design process. The tool features a customisable tile palette where users can add tiles of their choice, and a 3D grid-based system that makes placing and painting tiles faster and more intuitive. Built with level designers in mind, it removes the need for manual scene setup and allows rapid prototyping of level layouts. The tool was subsequently integrated into a Tower Defense game prototype, validating it in a real development context.
